use tokio::task::JoinHandle;
use tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken;

fn spawn_workers(data: Vec<WorkItem>, token: CancellationToken) -> Vec<JoinHandle<()>> {
    data.into_iter()
        .map(|item| {
            let token = token.clone();
            tokio::spawn(async move {
                tokio::select! {
                    _ = token.cancelled() => { }
                    _ = process(item) => { }
                }
            })
        })
        .collect()
}

fn spawn_background_cleanup(pool: Pool, token: CancellationToken) -> JoinHandle<()> {
    tokio::spawn(async move {
        loop {
            tokio::select! {
                _ = token.cancelled() => break,
                _ = pool.cleanup() => {}
            }
            tokio::time::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_secs(60)).await;
        }
    })
}

async fn process(_item: WorkItem) { todo!() }
struct WorkItem;
struct Pool;
impl Pool { async fn cleanup(&self) { todo!() } }
